description_long: This is a rectangular cardboard box of Gibbs Pasta Elbow Macaroni, predominantly red in color with yellow and white accents. The front of the box features a clear window displaying the elbow macaroni inside, along with the brand logo, product name, and a quality seal. The sides of the box provide nutritional information, ingredients, and manufacturer details, while the back includes detailed boiling instructions, a recipe, and additional text in both English and Urdu. The box is sealed and designed for retail sale, with all surfaces covered in printed graphics and text. The packaging appears sturdy and is intended to keep the pasta fresh and protected from external elements.
description: A red rectangular cardboard box of Gibbs Pasta Elbow Macaroni with a clear window showing the pasta inside and detailed printed labeling on all sides.
description_view_0: The front view shows the brand logo, product name, a window revealing the elbow macaroni, and decorative graphics.
description_view_1: The left side displays nutritional facts, ingredients, and manufacturer information in a vertical layout.
description_view_2: The back features boiling instructions, a recipe, and text in both English and Urdu, with a yellow label indicating boiling time.
description_view_3: The right side contains a product description, quality certifications, and additional branding elements.
attribute_labeling: Front: brand logo, product name, pasta window, quality seal; Sides: nutritional facts, ingredients, manufacturer info, certifications; Back: boiling instructions, recipe, text in English and Urdu.
